# litellm (hosted on Emergent's internal asset server, unreachable from a
# plain EC2 box), and other unused scaffold deps (openai, google-genai,
# google-generativeai, stripe, boto3, s3transfer, pandas, numpy, pillow,
# tiktoken, tokenizers, huggingface_hub, black/flake8/mypy/isort dev tools,
# pytest, watchfiles, etc.) that nothing in backend/*.py actually imports.

# against this exact repo on 2026-06-28.
